one_line_summary: Cleanly integrated the CLI command and documentation, but implemented a purely linear prompt chain with extremely shallow tests.
strengths: Excellent reuse of existing Engine and SessionBuilder abstractions.
Comprehensive documentation updates in README and Wiki.
ADR effectively outlines the problem and agent role division.
weaknesses: Implementation fails to enforce the red-green contract programmatically (no bounce-back loop if RED passes).
Tests merely mock Engine.run and count calls instead of validating the end-to-end TDD flow.
Does not parse or verify actual test results between phases.
